{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma (+2.5%), Auto (+1.5%), Metals (+1.8%), Realty (+2%), Energy (+1.4%) all leading. India VIX cooling -5% to 18.71 supports risk-on. Book is 60% deployed, +0.32% on day, sitting on multiple winners — focus shifts to position management (trailing SLs) over fresh entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank with strong Q4 (+35% PAT, NNPA 0.13%, CASA 52.5%). Down 2.7% from entry but holding above VWAP 79.47 today on +1.64% bounce. SL at 76.50 = 4% below CMP, well-defined. Thesis intact post-results; QIP overhang is medium-term. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.20,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Existing SL at 1029.20 is already above entry (984), locking in ~4.6% gain. CMP 1048.60 — current SL is fine. No-op MODIFY would waste signal; flagging HOLD intent. Actually emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge ahead of Fed FOMC Apr 29-30. Marginal -0.4% loss. SL at 119 = 4.5% below CMP. Hold as portfolio diversifier; reassess post-Fed."
    },

      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",

      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "new_target": 425.00,

      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL at 405 already at breakeven+. CMP 410.20 (+1.5%). At current P&L just shy of +2% trail trigger. Same values stored — no-op; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },

      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",

      "product": "CNC",

    },

      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",

Position size ~5% (270*183 = ~49k) given moderate confidence. SL 178 (2.7%) = risk budget 0.13% of portfolio. R:R = 12/5 = 2.4:1. Adds metals exposure (no current metals position in book)."

    {

  "watchlist_notes": "PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER OPEN orders being monitored — TATAPOWER fill would push power cluster to 4 names; may CANCEL on next tick if cluster concentration becomes uncomfortable. SAIL added as standalone metals exposure. M&MFIN, IDFCFIRSTB, INDUSINDBK worth re-watching post-results dust settling.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 60% deployed with multiple winners and breakevens. Hysteresis rule applied — defaulting to position management over fresh adds. SAIL is the only new entry, sized conservatively (~5%) to add metals diversification. 9 existing positions emit HOLD; 3 OPEN orders left undisturbed per order hygiene. Daily loss limit fully intact; +0.32% on day. Watch for Apr 29-30 macro events (Fed, ECB, HUL Q4, VEDL Q4, JSWSTEEL Q4) — likely trim/exit some positions ahead. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID = ~12% capital) at upper bound; not adding TATAPOWER unless OPEN order fills naturally on a deep dip."
